architecture.summary: 14+ code paths bypass resolveEffectiveRoot() using process.cwd(). Need getSpecweavePath() utility in find-project-root.ts. Config flag mismatch between findUmbrellaRoot (umbrella.enabled) and detectUmbrellaParent (repository.umbrellaRepo).

integrations.summary: N/A - internal CLI bug fix, no external service integrations affected

ui-ux.summary: N/A - dashboard is internal dev tool. Fix ensures correct data display when run from child repo in umbrella workspace.

performance.summary: N/A - bug fix only. resolveEffectiveRoot() already exists, just needs to be called instead of process.cwd().

security.summary: N/A - path resolution is internal, no user input reaches paths unsanitized. No security implications.

edge-cases.summary: Umbrella vs standalone mode, nested child repos, stale .specweave dirs in child repos, config flag mismatch (umbrella.enabled vs repository.umbrellaRepo), zero test coverage for resolution functions.
